_meta.source: Ministry of Manpower (MOM) gazette via eGazette.gov.sg
_meta.notes: HRP and HRH subject to moon sighting (±1 day). Sunday PHs generate Monday in-lieu under Holidays Act 1998 s.4(2) — derived automatically by sop_calculator.py, not listed here.
_meta.verification_note: Singapore holidays are verified annually against the MOM gazette (mom.gov.sg/newsroom/press-releases) and eGazette. This is the authoritative source for SOP Act calculations. Maintained by the skill author.

2025.source: eGazette No. 2493 — Singapore Public Holidays 2025 (published 5 Aug 2024)
2025.notes: HRP and HRH are subject to moon sighting and may shift by ±1 day; gazette is authoritative.

2026.notes: HRP and HRH are subject to moon sighting and may shift by ±1 day; gazette is authoritative.
